exercise: Explain why a public DFAST replication cannot reproduce confidential supervisory models.

exercise: Compute RMSE and MAE manually for a small set of observed and predicted CET1 ratios.

exercise: Explain why DB USA Corporation appears as a tail error case in the validation output.
